race.comment: ACAPULCO GIRL (4) returned in fine fashion with a strong victory around this circuit and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Is yet to miss a quinella spot in four starts at this track and winning rider Thompson sticks in the stirrups. Goes on top. LUMENS LENNY (7) is yet to miss a drum in four attempts over this track and trip and will be rock-hard fit for this. Likely to play a major role in the outcome. JUNGLE LAW (3) saves her best form for this distance range and gets some weight off with the 1.5kg claim. Top-three aspirations. JOY A PLENTY (10) doesn't know how to run a bad race and is a must for the exotics players. RUBYDOO (14) best of the rest from the favourable draw.
